scripts.build:www: node -e "const fse=require('fs-extra'); fse.emptyDirSync('www'); fse.copySync('app.html','www/index.html'); fse.copySync('app.html','www/app.html'); fse.copySync('logo.png','www/logo.png'); fse.copySync('logo.ico','www/logo.ico'); fse.copySync('manifest.json','www/manifest.json'); fse.copySync('sw.js','www/sw.js'); fse.copySync('css','www/css'); fse.copySync('js','www/js'); console.log('www built');"
scripts.build:android: npm run build:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run build:android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
